narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 5-D (precinct in Ross County) has 560 registered voters, with 63.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.8 percentage points.
